## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website redesign changes, focusing on blog layout and CTA strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog layout updates include grid view, subscribe placement, and mini table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Debate over removing inline CTAs at end of blogs in favor of newsletter subscription](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Team leans towards keeping tailored resource CTAs at blog ends, matching reader intent](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Plan to create a table of CTAs for 2H, aligning with campaign strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Topics

### Blog Page Redesign

  - [Shifting to grid view for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Relocating subscribe button to prevent glossing over](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Retaining categories display](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Individual blog layout changes:](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Mini table of contents added for quicker navigation](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [Narrower view, but minimal overall changes](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

### CTA Strategy Discussion

  - [Bonfire agency proposed removing inline CTAs at blog ends](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Team's perspective:](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - [Prefer tailored resource CTAs over generic newsletter subscription](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Matt: "I want blogs to end with... go read our five dysfunctions"](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Ehtisham: "Theoretically, having just one CTA... works out best" but noted subscribe vs. specific resource are different intents](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Current setup includes demo request CTA at bottom of some blogs](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Consensus: CTAs should match blog content and reader intent (e.g., Geo blog showcasing product features)](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Newsletter Subscription Placement

  - [Team not passionate about prominent newsletter placement until program is solid](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Ashleigh: "I don't love this here" (referring to newsletter subscription at blog end)](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Agreed to keep newsletter subscription on main blog listing page for now](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Website Migration Planning

  - [Bonfire creating migration plan for potential switch from .io to .ai domain](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Cody: "I think they're over-engineering it based on what I've seen"](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Internal confusion among IT resources about requirements](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Team committed to keeping GrowthX informed of any architectural changes](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody and Matt to create a table of CTAs for 2H, aligning with campaign strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Continue monitoring website redesign progress, especially architectural changes](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Refine CTA strategy based on blog content and intent](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Review Bonfire's migration plan for potential domain switch](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Address internal IT resource confusion regarding migration requirements](https://fathom.video/share/7oA9qe97LwaqXFnV6ua2jDr9knede8p3?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
